ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season in which the game was played */,
  "daynum" INTEGER /* Day number of the game in the season */,
  "wteam" INTEGER /* Winning team ID */,
  "wscore" INTEGER /* Score of the winning team */,
  "lteam" INTEGER /* Losing team ID */,
  "lscore" INTEGER /* Score of the losing team */,
  "wloc" TEXT /* Location of the game (Home, Neutral) */,
  "num_ot" INTEGER /* Number of overtime periods played */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the game was played */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_lteam FOREIGN KEY ("lteam") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_wteam FOREIGN KEY ("wteam") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Mascot of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "contract_expiry" INTEGER /* Year the player's current contract expires */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics row */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for which statistics are recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player for which statistics are recorded */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds made by the player in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers made by the player in the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player in the game */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the player */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted by the player */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made by the player */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted by the player */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the player */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship for the season */,
  "mvp_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the Most Valuable Player (MVP) award for the season */,
  "top_scorer_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was the top scorer for the season */,
  "top_assister_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who made the most assists for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_mvp_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("mvp_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_top_scorer_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("top_scorer_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_top_assister_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("top_assister_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the coach started their tenure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the coach ended their tenure */,
  "coaching_record" TEXT /* Summary of the coach's record (e.g., wins, losses) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the team in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the team in the season */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Total draws by the team in the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team in the season */,
  "points_allowed" INTEGER /* Total points allowed by the team in the season */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Final rank of the team in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_coverage" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media coverage entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being covered */,
  "media_outlet" TEXT /* Name of the media outlet providing coverage */,
  "coverage_date" TEXT /* Date of coverage */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage (e.g., article, video) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL to the media coverage content */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the media coverage */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of shares for the media coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_coverage_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan engagement entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with engagement metrics */,
  "fan_count" INTEGER /* Number of fans attending the game */,
  "social_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of social media mentions related to the game */,
  "fan_score" REAL /* Calculated fan score based on engagement metrics */,
  "ticket_sales" INTEGER /* Total ticket sales for the game */,
  "average_ticket_price" REAL /* Average price of tickets sold */,
  "merchandise_sales" INTEGER /* Total sales of merchandise related to the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience officiating */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the referee started officiating */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the referee stopped officiating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the referee based on performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)
